title: draba verna var. spathulata
intro: Draba verna var. spathulata, also known as the early winter cress, is a subspecies of the early winter cress plant, a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Draba verna var. spathulata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, it has been prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
